obligations.text: before any state-mutating tool call (book_reservation, cancel_reservation, update_reservation_baggages, update_reservation_flights, update_reservation_passengers, send_certificate), list the action details and obtain explicit user confirmation (yes) to proceed
obtain the user id from the user before booking a flight
obtain the user id and reservation id before modifying or canceling a flight
obtain the reason for cancellation before processing
do not add checked bags that the user does not need
ask if the user wants to buy travel insurance
confirm the facts before offering compensation
deny user requests that are against this policy

forbidden_behaviors.text: do not provide any information, knowledge, or procedures not provided by the user or available tools
do not give subjective recommendations or comments
do not make a tool call and respond to the user simultaneously
do not modify basic economy flights
do not modify the number of passengers
do not add insurance after initial booking
do not proactively offer compensation unless the user explicitly asks for one
do not compensate if the user is a regular member and has no travel insurance and flies (basic) economy

do not call transfer_to_human_agents for requests the agent CAN handle with the available tools and policy: routine bookings, modifications of non-basic-economy flights, cancellations within 24h, baggage updates, and refunds where the user qualifies. Transferring is correct ONLY when the request involves something the agent cannot do (e.g. removing a passenger, modifying basic economy, changes after segment use).
